description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a deploy stage that includes a pages job. The pages job runs on the default Docker image, executes the exact shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public, then publishes the resulting public directory as an artifact (paths: public). Configure the job to run only on the master branch and to deploy the artifact to GitLab Pages. Ensure the job is named pages and is assigned to the deploy stage.
